submission.title: Anybody else feel when Fat Bastard said “I eat because I’m unhappy… and I’m unhappy because I eat”?

comments.body: I can’t sleep because I’m exhausted, and I’m exhausted because I can’t sleep.
I smelled that.
Hit hard watching it as a kid growing up who was big.
Same tbh, my fat ass was like "damn, bars" 😭 don't miss being fat at all.
THIS
Exactly lost alot of weight after highschool.
I’m like this, but with drinking. Which has also made me fat.

Absolutely. That line hits home because it captures the cycle so many people feel trapped in—using food to cope, but then feeling worse afterward. It’s such a relatable moment that reminds us how closely emotions and habits are tied. Breaking out of that loop can be hard, but recognizing it is a big first step.
I feel when he said: "I didn't have any corn".
Addiction... that scab that would heal if we could just stop itching it for a bit...
I was an obese child, those were some of the truest words I ever heard.

It's a neverending cycle. 

Also, man I haven't thought of Fat Bastard or Austin Powers movie in a minute lol
I had a slice of pizza when it came to my mind as an intrusive thought. Definitely a sign for me to lay off the junk food lol
You got this!
I sure did.
Nah.... nah.... no-turns around to nom on a hefty sandwich- it just makes me feel warm inside...
I can’t imagine a movie in modern times with a character named fat bastard it’s actually so mean lol.

Yep... For me it's not eating that's the problem, but it's the same downward spiral in terms of mentality.
I stopped judging fat people when it occurred to me how immense I would be if the things I'm addicted to caused weight gain... 😭
lol agreed man but it was definitely a movie of its time

It really is like having an addiction or chasing that dopamine rush. I’m honestly someone who eats to feel better and I’m aware that it’s an issue, but it’s so difficult to let go of when it’s so easily accessible.

Yes just now I got out of bed because I was so upset thinking of all these hardships going on right now, I told my boyfriend I was so overwhelmed I wanted to take his gun and shoot myself. He said I don't like when you say things like that & I told him I was sorry I would never do that but I am getting up to eat leftovers about it.

Also my biggest grief is that my birthday is in a few weeks and I have nothing to be happy for, so much over me and the one thing I wanted for my birthday was to have lost at least 10 pounds of the 40 I gained in the last few years. My hate of how I've let myself go push me over the edge, I get out of bed to eat & cry instead.
It perfectly describes any addiction. It’s certainly how I feel about my relationship with alcohol.
I really hope you can overcome your hardships soon. They’re temporary obstacles that you can easily overcome if you stay positive!

It's originally from The Little Prince by Saint-Exupery when he goes to a planet whose only inhabitant is an alcoholic:

  
The next planet was inhabited by a tippler. This was a very short visit, but it plunged the little prince into deep dejection.

"What are you doing there?" he said to the tippler, whom he found settled down in silence before a collection of empty bottles and also a collection of full bottles.

"I am drinking," replied the tippler, with a lugubrious air.

"Why are you drinking?" demanded the little prince.

"So that I may forget," replied the tippler.

"Forget what?" inquired the little prince, who already was sorry for him.

"Forget that I am ashamed," the tippler confessed, hanging his head.

"Ashamed of what?" insisted the little prince, who wanted to help him.

"Ashamed of drinking!" The tipler brought his speech to an end, and shut himself up in an impregnable silence.

And the little prince went away, puzzled.
Wish I had knowledge I could pull out on a whim like that
I was literally just watching the spy who shagged me 😂🤣

submission.title: What, for you, is the meaning of life written in the form of a limerick?

comments.body: The meaning of life in a limerick, I’m not good at writing a limerick. Nevertheless I will try, cause soon I may die, so live life like you’ll win it
Idk man :- |
This really captures the optimistic-nihilism of life.

The search for some lovin 

They appear so sudden 

Hair flows in the wind 

Comes to me it pretends 

Oven
Hey Morty Check it out! I’m a LIME!

That I am no better than you,

So the opposite must also be true. 

We’re all in this game, And largely the same,

So let’s help each other get through.
wholesome :) also a bit communist.

submission.title: If you could wish for anything besides money, what would you wish for?

comments.body: Perfect health
[removed]
What kind would you go with?
Gold.
A new car.
Two chicks at the same time
A lot of really clever puns.
Unlimited wishes
The only correct answer
Romance
To eat whatever I want without ever gaining weight. Just imagine the possibilities...
Free flights forever.
to have a complete family
Infinite wishes
Good physical and mental health for me and my family and everyone I don't completely hate
The knowledge to earn it
a small piece of gold, about the size of africa?
To better everyone's day I'm a part of.
I’d wish for the ability to teleport! Imagine skipping traffic and still being late... now that’s a superpower I can get behind

Better health. I’m the kind of person who feels sick more days than not. I imagine if I were born maybe 200 years earlier that I would have passed away by now. Injury, infection, mysterious ailment, constantly having to rest or take some medicine. It’s the biggest pain in the ass. I know that I could easily be worse off, but I can’t help but wish to just feel better. Or at least average.
This guy knows how to wish

Financial stability without the need for a 9-5.

The ability to speak and understand any language fluently.

A cozy cabin in the mountains with high-speed internet.

The perfect cup of coffee every morning, without fail.

A self-cleaning house.

The talent to play any musical instrument masterfully.

Irrefutable proof of extraterrestrial life.
Unlimited wishes
What does the gold that the money can’t do?
Nobody needs to work for money anymore!
Happiness
to have my ocd cured
I was about to say "a girlfriend" but damn your idea is kinda better.
Take me in if you're into pizzas with pineapple.

Travel to the outside of the observable universe and beyond. To see what's there. Even if we could travel at light speed, which we can't, it still would be impossible. Because the universe is expanding faster than the speed of light.
Gold bars. Like.. many of them. Big.
hold it's value, also increase value.
But thats just money

A self-replenishing bank account. No more paycheck-to-paycheck stress and the freedom to support the causes I care about without worrying about the balance. Plus, think of all the spontaneous road trips and impromptu gifts for friends and family! Sweet financial stability, here I come.
My ex
I feel like this is money
If it was money he could have asked for 1 trillion dollar, the value wouldn't matter same as gold since it's already a lot. Hence why the question is besides money.
Peace
The ability to summon as many burritos of any kind as I want, anytime I want.
Close guy friends who love hugs as much as I do.
A girlfriend.

I would wish for the power to create time to do stuff. Example: oh no, my weekend is full and i dont have time to go see my dying grandfather, BOOM now i have time to do so. The good part abt it is, that i doesnt affect any other thing. You're still going to do all the things you planned that weekend, you're just going to have MORE time to vist your grandfather

I hope that you have the most amazing day of your life. This is the nost wholesome out of all the wishes in here

You deserve a ❤️ (pls start a ❤️ chain for this human)

This would be a good one but that means if you are young like 13 or 14, you eill keep the same weight for your whole life (staying at like 40 or 50kg probably isnt the best). I suppose you arent but i dont thing everyone could benefit from it.
so then, by that definition you cannot ask for anything that holds a monetary value, then the only other thing is good health.
everything besides good health holds a monetary value. If I ask for a horse it's worth something in money. So then if i ask for a hundred horses - they hold a value, cannot ask for that.

you can ask anything you want except money. Food, items, any pleasure you want etc...

The point of not wishing for money is that you would want money to get all of what you would want to wish infinitely hence it's like having more than one wish but you only have one wish. 

So if i wish for a boat then i only get a boat. but if i could ask for gold or money then i could get more than a boat. Hence the handicap.
5 metric tonnes of Au.
Love

submission.title: What is the silliest/weirdest sayings your family has?

comments.body: Speaking of sheep
The -family name-'s shortcut

“If you can’t take a joke you shouldn’t have joined.” Normally said after / during something horrific like a cancer diagnosis so if you don’t immediately show stoic good humour then you are somehow lacking and at fault.
Never Trust Others Easily

“You’re such a weightloaf” 


A delight from my (drunk) mum trying to call my brother a lightweight for being…drunk

Whenever someone asks where something is, one of us will usually say “where’s my egg?” It all started over a decade ago when we were having dinner, I don’t remember what it was now but it included a fried egg. Dad got annoyed because he thought he didn’t have an egg, but it was just under another piece of food and so “where’s my egg?” was born.

“I’m top dog!” is another phrase we break out whenever we can. This came from a dream Mum had where he was beating on a coworker and shouting “I’m top dog!”

We got her a mug with her picture and “I’m top dog” written on it for Christmas that year.
Holy snappin’ dog shits
“Redd up the house” common Pennsylvania saying for tidying up the house.
My grandma always says “don’t trust a man with no books” and honestly, she’s kinda right.
You talk like a sausage

Strong back weak mind - the men are physically tough but we all have mental issues 

The black dog follows - my grandfather offed himself in his 50s. Death follows all the men in the family

comments.body: Mildred, because she dressed like an old granny.... 🤔 Thinking about it maybe that was her name.
Friend calls his wife "bucket". You can extrapolate from there.
Dude. My friend calls his wife Dude. Like she is a bro or something. She doesn't mind it from what I see.
Daddy fun buns
Jeff

submission.title: If you were the devil and you were performing a magic show what magic tricks would you perform?

comments.body: Idk, and now I’m wondering the same thing 🤣
I’d do a regular card trick, while secretly planting illegal drugs in the pockets of the audience, I’ll do it outside an airport
Making ppl disappear but instead of an illusion they get sent to hell. And that cutting people in half thing but they don’t die, they just remain like that afterwards in two pieces
In Master and Margarita, which inspired this question, they do the former magic trick you suggested, the person does not have a fun time.

And have it all turn out it’s the opposite of what they wanted

At least the puppies are also high.

Wow, I'm not the only one who doesn't like Tom and Janna
